title: On-Demand 3D Printer Platform
description: API and web application for intake, quoting, queue management, and fulfillment across custom print requests.
overview: This project is meant to turn a pile of manual print-request coordination into a usable system. The API handles request intake and print-job state. The web app handles quoting, operations visibility, and customer communication.
currentMilestone: Build a dependable order-to-queue path that keeps pricing, material selection, and production status aligned.

roadmap.text: Define the request and quote lifecycle clearly
Add authenticated operator workflows for reviewing jobs
Track printer capacity and queue contention
Add webhook-driven notifications for state changes
